category.scope_note: General domestic furniture comparison - China manufacturing to Canada market.

target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（CCPSA / 加拿大卫生部）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（CCPSA / 加拿大衛生部）

title.zh: 中国家具进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家具進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China furniture documentation against Canadian requirements under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, Mattresses Regulations, composite wood formaldehyde rules, clothing-storage tip-over expectations, and English/French bilingual labelling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家具文件与加拿大要求对照，涵盖《加拿大消费品安全法》、床垫条例、复合木制品甲醛规则、衣物收纳家具防倾倒要求及英法双语标签。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家具文件與加拿大要求對照，涵蓋《加拿大消費品安全法》、床墊條例、複合木製品甲醛規則、衣物收納家具防傾倒要求及英法雙語標籤。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Canadian federal law, Health Canada guidance, provincial language rules, voluntary CSA standards, and product-specific retailer requirements with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行加拿大联邦法律、加拿大卫生部指南、省级语言规则、自愿性CSA标准及产品特定零售商要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行加拿大聯邦法律、加拿大衛生部指南、省級語言規則、自願性CSA標準及產品特定零售商要求。

answer_first.en: For Chinese furniture exported to Canada, the main gaps are CCPSA general product safety and incident-documentation duties, mandatory mattress cigarette-ignition flammability under SOR/2016-183, composite wood formaldehyde limits and labelling under SOR/2021-148, voluntary or proposed clothing-storage tip-over stability expectations, and English/French bilingual label content. Canada has no single CE-style furniture mark.
answer_first.zh: 中国家具出口加拿大的主要差距包括：CCPSA通用产品安全及事故文件义务、SOR/2016-183床垫香烟点火阻燃强制要求、SOR/2021-148复合木制品甲醛限值及标签要求、自愿性或拟议的衣物收纳家具防倾倒稳定性要求，以及英法双语标签内容。加拿大没有类似CE的统一家具标志。
answer_first.zht: 中國家具出口加拿大的主要差距包括：CCPSA通用產品安全及事故文件義務、SOR/2016-183床墊香菸點火阻燃強制要求、SOR/2021-148複合木製品甲醛限值及標籤要求、自願性或擬議的衣物收納家具防傾倒穩定性要求，以及英法雙語標籤內容。加拿大沒有類似CE的統一家具標誌。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Government of Canada, Health Canada, Justice Laws Website, Canada Gazette, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and third-party summaries are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
